descripciones.texto: Moving through water using your arms and legs, often done in a pool or the sea.
Riding a bicycle, either for exercise, transport, or as a competitive sport.
Propelling a boat forward using long oars, usually practiced on rivers or lakes.
A sport that combines strength, flexibility, and balance, often performed on a mat or with equipment like bars and rings.
A sport in which competitors shoot arrows at a target using a bow.
A tall piece of furniture with doors, used to hang and store clothes.
A single, comfortable chair with armrests, usually found in a living room.
The thick, padded part of a bed that you actually lie on.
A piece of furniture with several stacked drawers, used to store folded clothes.
A flat piece of glass that reflects your image, often hung on a wall.
A long piece of fabric worn around the neck, often for warmth or style.
A strip of leather or fabric worn around the waist to hold up trousers.
A soft knitted jacket, usually buttoned up the front, worn over a shirt.
A waterproof coat worn to stay dry when it's raining outside.
A narrow piece of cloth worn around the neck under a shirt collar, usually with formal outfits.
A small animal with a bushy tail that climbs trees and collects nuts.
A highly intelligent sea mammal known for jumping out of the water and being friendly toward humans.
A slow-moving reptile with a hard shell that protects its body.
An animal from Australia that carries its baby in a pouch and moves by jumping.
A small animal covered in sharp spines that curls into a ball when it feels threatened.
Describes someone who refuses to change their mind or opinion, even when others disagree.
Describes someone who likes to give money, gifts, or time to help other people.
Describes someone who always wants to learn new things and ask questions about the world.
Describes someone who can wait calmly for a long time without getting annoyed or upset.
Describes someone who has strong goals and works hard to become very successful.
